entity.summary: Weighted-pool automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing token liquidity and spot swaps across gaming-oriented chain deployments including Oasys and DeFiVerse-related environments.
entity.notes: Current first-party Gaming DEX application endpoint remains reachable as a JavaScript Balancer-style application. DefiLlama independently classifies Gaming DEX as a weighted-pool AMM DEX providing token liquidity and reports current TVL plus cumulative fees and DEX volume across supported deployments. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation is limited in this review pass.

evidence.title: Gaming DEX official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Gaming DEX application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange interface shell.

evidence.title: Gaming DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Gaming DEX as a weighted-pool AMM DEX providing token liquidity and reports current TVL plus cumulative fees and DEX volume across Oasys and related deployments.

evidence.title: Gaming DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gaming DEX and supports consolidation of chain-specific source rows under one exchange entity.
